mapper.sql: select id, bid_id, parent_id, level, title, title_prefix, title_text, sort_num, word_limit, requirement_desc, writing_direction, writing_requirement, direction_mode, requirement_mode, content_words from tdw_outlines
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tdw_outlines WHERE bid_id = #{bidId} AND level = #{level} ORDER BY sort_num ASC, id ASC

select o.id, o.bid_id, o.parent_id, o.level, o.title, o.title_prefix, o.title_text, o.sort_num, o.word_limit, o.requirement_desc, o.writing_direction, o.writing_requirement, o.direction_mode, o.requirement_mode, o.content_words from tdw_outline_closure c inner join tdw_outlines o on c.descendant = o.id where c.ancestor = #{outlineId} and o.level = 3 order by c.depth desc, o.parent_id asc, o.sort_num asc, o.id asc

select id, bid_id, parent_id, level, title, title_prefix, title_text, sort_num, word_limit, requirement_desc, writing_direction, writing_requirement, direction_mode, requirement_mode, content_words from tdw_outlines where bid_id = #{bidId} order by level asc, parent_id asc, sort_num asc, id asc
select id, bid_id, parent_id, level, sort_num from tdw_outlines where id = #{id}
select id from tdw_outlines where bid_id = #{bidId}
mapper.insert:
insert into tdw_outlines
bid_id, parent_id, level, title, title_prefix, title_text, sort_num, word_limit, requirement_desc, writing_direction, writing_requirement, direction_mode, requirement_mode, content_words,
#{bidId}, #{parentId}, #{level}, #{title}, #{titlePrefix}, #{titleText}, #{sortNum}, #{wordLimit}, #{requirementDesc}, #{writingDirection}, #{writingRequirement}, #{directionMode}, #{requirementMode}, #{contentWords},

INSERT INTO tdw_outlines(bid_id, level, title, title_prefix, title_text, sort_num, word_limit, requirement_desc, writing_direction, writing_requirement, direction_mode, requirement_mode, content_words) VALUES
(#{item.bidId}, #{item.level}, #{item.title}, #{item.titlePrefix}, #{item.titleText}, #{item.sortNum}, #{item.wordLimit}, #{item.requirementDesc}, #{item.writingDirection}, #{item.writingRequirement}, #{item.directionMode}, #{item.requirementMode}, #{item.contentWords})
mapper.update: update tdw_outlines set title = #{title} where id = #{id}
update tdw_outlines set word_limit = #{wordLimit} where id = #{id}
update tdw_outlines set sort_num = #{sortNum} where id = #{id}

update.foreach: UPDATE tdw_outlines SET parent_id = #{item.parentId} WHERE id = #{item.id}

mapper.update: update tdw_outlines SET sort_num = sort_num + 1 WHERE bid_id = #{bidId} and parent_id IS NULL AND sort_num >= #{sortNum}
update tdw_outlines SET sort_num = sort_num - 1 WHERE bid_id = #{bidId} and parent_id IS NULL AND sort_num > #{sortNum}
update tdw_outlines SET sort_num = sort_num + 1 WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND sort_num >= #{sortNum}
update tdw_outlines SET sort_num = sort_num - 1 WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND sort_num > #{sortNum}
mapper.delete:
delete from tdw_outlines where id in
#{id}

delete from tdw_outlines where id in
#{id}
